title: 2026 Golden Globes: Best Supporting Actor Winner
text: Stellan Skarsgård took home the Golden Globe for Best Supporting Actor at the 2026 ceremony, earning recognition for his performance in Sentimental Value. The prestigious award recognized Skarsgård among a competitive field. Other nominees included Benicio del Toro and Sean Penn, both for One Battle After Another, as well as Jacob Elordi for Frankenstein, Paul Mescal for Hamnet, and Adam Sandler for Jay Kelly. The awards ceremony, held at the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, was hosted by comedian Nikki Glaser for her second consecutive year. The ceremony featured recognition of diverse international and domestic films, with Sentimental Value's win marking a significant recognition for Scandinavian cinema at the Golden Globes.
